meta.title: Codemage — Full-stack Web Development by Andrei
meta.description: Fast, maintainable websites, web apps, storefronts and integrations for startups and small teams.
meta.keywords: web development, web design, frontend, backend, react, next.js, full-stack developer

hero.title2: — a full-stack developer for web products
hero.subtitle: I turn unclear product ideas into scoped, launch-ready web apps with React, Next.js, Node.js and Golang. You get direct communication, pragmatic UI decisions and code that is easy to maintain.

services.title: Web development that moves the product forward
services.subtitle: From first scope to production support: focused engineering for sites, apps and integrations that need to be clear, fast and reliable.

items.title: Web Applications
items.desc: Dashboards, portals and product interfaces with clear flows, real-time updates and maintainable frontend architecture.

items.title: Frontend & UI
items.desc: Responsive React and Next.js interfaces that stay readable, fast and consistent across devices.

items.title: Backend & APIs
items.desc: Node.js and Golang services, REST or GraphQL APIs, databases and integrations designed around the product flow.

items.title: E-commerce
items.desc: Storefronts, checkout flows and payment integrations built to reduce friction and support growth.

items.title: Performance & SEO
items.desc: Core Web Vitals, structured metadata and frontend optimization so pages load quickly and can be indexed properly.

items.title: Support & Maintenance
items.desc: Bug fixes, updates, monitoring and incremental improvements after launch.

skills.title: Stack I use in production
skills.subtitle: A focused toolkit for maintainable products, not a list of every library I've tried.

portfolio.title: Product work in the real world
portfolio.subtitle: Examples across enterprise retail, document workflow, EdTech, CRM/GovTech and gaming platforms.

items.title: Retail Super-App Platform
items.desc: Built a high-load quick-survey module under tight deadlines, introduced micro-frontends for independent releases, and added a real-time WebSocket chat-bot with a stronger Node.js BFF layer.

items.title: Document Management Platform
items.desc: Modernized a large document workflow product, optimized Webpack builds, reduced backend pressure with BFF caching, and sped up delivery through Docker-cached CI/CD and generated frontend clients.

items.title: EdTech Learning Platform
items.desc: Built a custom video player with timestamps and a dynamic course builder. Added shared Google/Yandex analytics and a Swagger-led workflow with backend teams.

items.title: CRM & GovTech Solutions
items.desc: Delivered product features across CRM and GovTech systems, then improved team delivery with GitHub Actions CI/CD and ESLint-based code standards.

items.title: CS:GO Case Opening Platform
items.desc: Built a Counter-Strike case-opening product with animated roulette drops, real-time inventory, item upgrades and payment flows.

process.title: A clear path from scope to launch
process.subtitle: You always know what is being built, what changed and what happens next.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: We define goals, users, risks and the first useful release before writing code.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: I turn the scope into flows, wireframes and UI decisions that fit the product and keep development focused.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: I build in short iterations, share progress regularly and keep code structured for future changes.

steps.title: Launch & Support
steps.desc: We release, check performance and fix the next highest-value improvements after real use.

contact.title: Tell me what you want to build
contact.subtitle: Send the context you already have: goal, deadline, current stack or a rough idea. I usually reply within a few hours.

form.heading: Project details
form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Goal, deadline, links, current stack or anything else useful
form.success: Message sent. I'll reply soon with the next step.
form.error: I couldn't send the message. Try again or contact me directly by email or Telegram.

about.title: About Andrei
about.subtitle: An independent developer based in Tbilisi, registered as an individual entrepreneur and available for remote work with clients worldwide.
about.name: Andrei
about.bio: I build and scale B2B/B2C web products: e-commerce, document workflow, EdTech, gaming platforms and internal tools. I work across React, TypeScript, Node.js and Golang, so product decisions, frontend details and backend constraints stay connected.
about.addressValue: Georgia, Tbilisi, Saburtalo district, Bakhtrioni street, N22
